title: Yes, People Are Already Worshipping AI as a Deity

title: College Graduates Are Facing the Grimmest Job Market in Years
description: Artificial intelligence could reshape work, but for now a low-hire, low-fire labor market is the main impediment for young people seeking employment.
content:

title: AI Revolutionizes Weather Forecasting in India
description: The India Meteorological Department is enhancing weather forecasts using artificial intelligence and cutting-edge technology. Deputy Director Abhishek Anand highlighted AI's role in improving data analysis and prediction accuracy. Recent upgrades, including supercomputers and advanced models, have significantly increased the precision of severe weather predictions, promising better real-time monitoring.
content:
The India Meteorological Department is pioneering the use of artificial intelligence and advanced technology to bolster the accuracy and speed of weather forecasts, according to a senior official.
